description: User successfully created a new account. Top of retention funnel.
User successfully signed in to their account.
User explicitly signed out of their account.
User added a new job application to their pipeline. Core product action.
User updated the status of an existing job application (e.g. saved → applied → interviewing). Key pipeline progression event.
User analyzed a job posting via LinkedIn URL or pasted text to get skill match and recommendation.
User added a missing job skill to their study plan directly from a job analysis result.
User added a new study subject to their preparation list.
User changed the status of a study subject (e.g. not_started → in_progress → mastered). Tracks study progress.
User added a new Q&A pair to a study subject for interview practice.
User added a new company to their research list.
User updated the status of a company they are tracking.
User pasted and saved a resume for skill matching. Enables job analysis matching against resume.
User viewed the landing page. Top of acquisition funnel — precedes signup.
